case_title: IXC HOLDINGS, INC. D/B/A TELEKENEX VS. RADA OFFICE PRODUCTS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC. D/B/A TELEKENEX SERVED OCT-31-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RADA OFFICE PRODUCTS, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-07-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. THE JUL-08-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY. THE FEB-18-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-07-2015 CONTINUED TO FEB-18-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 56712696)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-07-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IXC HOLDINGS, INC. D/B/A TELEKENEX AS TO DEFENDANT RADA OFFICE PRODUCTS, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-18-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-08-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
